question: Looking at the median income map, which statement below is the most accurate?

options.A: Ohio and Arizona have similar median incomes.
options.B: The median income gap between Ohio and Arizona might exceed that between Wyoming and Iowa.
options.C: The median income differences are impossible to determine from this visualization.
options.D: All highlighted states have nearly identical median income levels.

explanation: Ohio (51.0$k) and Arizona (57.8$k) have a 6.8$k median income difference, while Wyoming (49.9$k) and Iowa (50.1$k) have only a 0.2$k difference. However, the categorical color encoding groups Ohio and Arizona into the same color bin (50-60$k range), making their large difference appear similar, while Wyoming and Iowa appear more different due to different color bins.
